# FOSHT — Febriansyah S.Kom

> Personal portfolio and digital command center of Febriansyah, a Web Developer & AI Prompt Specialist based in Lampung, Indonesia.

## About
Febriansyah (FOSHT) is a web developer specializing in React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and AI-powered applications. Graduate of IIB Darmajaya with GPA 3.71 (2021-2025). Available for freelance and collaboration.

## Services (via Oshtore)
- Custom website development (Landing Page, Company Profile, Web App)
- AI prompt engineering and automation
- UI/UX design with Figma, Canva, CorelDraw

## Personal Projects
- Crypto Directory Indonesia: https://cryptodirectoryindonesia.io — blockchain ecosystem hub for Indonesia
- Oshtore (web dev services): https://oshtore.vercel.app
- Cyber Web Scanner: https://cyberwebscanner.onrender.com — automated security auditor
- Chat Global: https://chatglobal.cryptodirectoryindonesia.io — CLI-style crypto chat
- BlastFlow: https://blastflow.vercel.app — mass broadcast automation
- Jurnal Trading: https://jurnaltrading.cryptodirectoryindonesia.io

## Portfolio Clients
- Swakarsa Digital: https://swakarsadigital.vercel.app
- Jenggala Coffee & Brew: https://kerabatjenggala.xo.je
- PT. Anugerah Rekenan Bersama: https://anugerahrekananbersama.site
- PT. Gatha Gemilang Global: https://gggindonesia.com
- CV. Satu Optima Jaya: https://cvsatuoptimajaya.vercel.app
- Cassa Juara: https://cassa-juara.vercel.app
- Mochi Chewy: https://febriosht.github.io/Mochi-Chewy
- Flora Rose Catering: https://febriosht.github.io/Flora-Rose-Catering

## Tech Stack
HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, REST API, SEO
AI Tools: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Grok
Design: Canva, CorelDraw, Photoshop, Figma, CapCut
